hooks.command:
f=$(python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''))
"); [[ "$f" == *.py ]] || exit 0; .venv/bin/ruff format "$f" --quiet 2>/dev/null; .venv/bin/ruff check --fix "$f" --quiet 2>/dev/null
